title: Munch & Crunch Lamb & Rice Duo Treat, Bumper Box 16 Bags
features: TREAT & REWARD: Munch & Crunch exciting, bone shaped treat, nutritious and full of flavour, ideal way to treat your dog as part of a balanced diet. Perfect for training and rewarding your pet.
TASTY DOG TREAT: Munch & Crunch Duo Bones with Lamb and Rice, a complementary food for dogs. Treats are not meant to replace a well balanced diet for your dog. Irrisistible reward treat.

NUTRITIOUS & FULL OF FLAVOUR: Munch & Crunch Duo Bones with Lamb and Rice, feed as a treat or reward anytime, as part of a well balanced diet, Not suitable for puppies under 4 months old. Always supervise when feeding and keep fresh water available
STORAGE: Before and after opening keep in a cool dry place away from direct sunlight. Once opened always re-seal ready for next use.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Munch & Crunch Duo Bones with Lamb and Rice, each bag 140g. Supplied as bumper sized box of 16 bags.
description: Product Description Munch & Crunch exciting, bone shaped treat, nutritious and full of flavour, ideal way to treat your dog as part of a balanced diet. Perfect for training and rewarding your pet. Munch & Crunch Duo Bones with Lamb and Rice, feed as a treat or reward anytime, as part of a well balanced diet, Not suitable for puppies under 4 months old. Always supervise when feeding and keep fresh water available. Before and after opening keep in a cool dry place away from direct sunlight. Once opened always re-seal ready for next use. Munch & Crunch Duo Bones with Lamb and Rice, each bag 140g. Supplied as bumper sized box of 16 bags. Indications General nutrition for adult dogs Ingredients Cereals (4% rice), Meat and Animal derivatives (minimum 4% lamb), Vegetable protein extracts, Derivatives of vegetable origin, Oils and Fats. Directions Always supervise when feeding and keep fresh water available. Please adjust the main meal accordingly. See more
